description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define a single job named job that only runs on the master branch of the RJain12/rishab-jain repository. In the default stage, the job runs the following shell commands in order: apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y ruby ruby-dev rubygems-integration, npm install, gem install --no-rdoc --no-ri dpl, and dpl --provider=heroku --app=rishab-jain --api-key=9ebbcf81-4594-46e5-9736-2cfe165465ee to deploy the app to Heroku. No services, artifacts, or additional rules are defined.
